prompt: I'm getting 'bind: address already in use' when starting my Go HTTP server on macOS. How do I find and kill the process using that port?

assertions.description: Response includes the lsof command for finding port usage
Response includes kill or pkill command to terminate the process
Response includes a specific port number or placeholder in the command example
assertions.check: response.md contains a port number or '<port>' style placeholder in command

assertions.description: Response contains copy-pasteable shell commands (lines starting with $ or backtick code blocks)
assertions.check: response.md contains shell code block or $ prefixed commands
